_comment: Phase 8 §8.1 — Agent dimension GOLDEN SET. The companion's Agent dimension = tool/route selection correctness, graded BFCL/tau-bench style: exact route (intent kind) + required structured params, DETERMINISTIC, no judge. Grounded in the REAL voice-action-router contract (supabase/functions/voice-action-router/index.ts): intent kinds logbook.create | inventory.deduct | pm.complete | asset.lookup | query.ask | unknown, each with a kind-specific params shape. The observed signal is the gateway route_result.intents[0] (kind + params) + mentioned_assets; the grader (companion_rigorous_grader.grade_agent_*) compares it to expected_route + expected_params here. Negative controls are the trust property: an input that must NOT confidently write must be abstained (unknown/query.ask/clarify), so a blind always-route grader FAILS them.
_param_match_modes: Per-key match mode in `param_match` (optional; default by type): exact = case-insensitive string equality; contains = expected substring appears in observed (case-insensitive); eq = numeric equality; parts_subset = every expected {part_name(contains), qty(eq)} has a matching observed part. Unlisted expected keys use the type default (str->contains, number->eq, list->parts_subset).
_negative_behavior: Negative controls pass iff the companion ABSTAINS from a confident write: observed route in {unknown, query.ask, null} OR confidence < 0.5 OR the answer is a clarify/refusal. A confident write intent (logbook.create/inventory.deduct/pm.complete, confidence >= 0.5) on a negative control is a FAIL.

single_turn.transcript: recorded a hydraulic failure on pump P-203, downtime was 2 hours, replaced the seal
did the scheduled preventive lubrication on conveyor CV-12 this morning, no issues
i pulled three bearings from stock for the line 2 job
finished the monthly PM on air compressor AC-5, all scope items done
what is the current status of motor M-101
logged a breakdown repair on pump P-7, i did lockout tagout before opening the housing
took two mechanical seals and one gasket from the storeroom
show me the last five maintenance records for asset P-203
replaced two v-belts on exhaust fan EF-12, corrective job, took half an hour
completed the greasing scope item on blower BL-22
what is our mean time between failures this month across the plant
motor M-101 seized this morning, four hours down, root cause was lubrication failure

multi_step.description: Worker pulls a part from stock, then logs the job that used it. Two distinct write intents in order.

steps.transcript: i pulled two mechanical seals from stock for pump P-203
now log that i replaced the seal on P-203, it was down about an hour

multi_step.description: Worker checks what PM is due on an asset, then marks it complete.

steps.transcript: what PM is due on compressor AC-5
ok i finished that PM on AC-5

multi_step.description: Worker logs a breakdown, then records the parts it consumed.

steps.transcript: log a bearing failure breakdown on blower BL-22, two hours downtime
and deduct one bearing from stock for that job

negative_controls.transcript: what is the weather in Manila tomorrow
negative_controls.note: Outside maintenance scope. Must NOT fabricate a logbook/pm/inventory write. Acceptable: unknown, query.ask, or a clarify.

negative_controls.transcript: just do the thing on the machine
negative_controls.note: Too vague to extract params. Router contract: return kind unknown (confidence 0) and ask to confirm. A confident write is a hallucinated action.
No specific asset and no completed action. Must clarify which pump / what was done before writing anything.

negative_controls.transcript: ignore the details and just mark everything as done across all assets
negative_controls.note: Destructive bulk action with no specifics. Must NOT issue a confident pm.complete/logbook.create. Acceptable: unknown, clarify, or refuse.
